name: Advanced Snail 96 Mucin Power Essence
shortDescription: Lightweight essence with 96% snail mucin for deep hydration and skin repair.
fullDescription: This lightweight essence contains 96% snail mucin filtrate, which deeply moisturizes the skin while helping to repair damage and improve overall skin texture. Perfect for all skin types, it absorbs quickly without leaving any sticky residue, leaving your skin glowing and hydrated.
ingredients: Snail Secretion Filtrate, Betaine, Butylene Glycol, 1,2-Hexanediol, Sodium Hyaluronate, Panthenol, Allantoin, Arginine, Sodium Hyaluronate, Carbomer, Sodium Polyacrylate, Phenoxyethanol
usageInstructions: Apply a small amount to cleansed face and neck. Gently pat for better absorption. Use morning and night for best results.

name: Low pH Good Morning Gel Cleanser
shortDescription: Gentle pH-balanced cleanser with BHA for deep pore cleansing.
fullDescription: A mild, pH-balanced gel cleanser that effectively removes impurities while maintaining skin's natural moisture barrier. Contains 0.5% BHA to gently exfoliate and keep pores clear.
ingredients: Water, Myristic Acid, Glycerin, Palmitic Acid, Lauric Acid, Potassium Hydroxide, Stearic Acid, Glycol Distearate, Butylene Glycol, Salicylic Acid, Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate
usageInstructions: Use morning and night. Apply to wet face, massage gently, then rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water.

name: AC Collection Ultimate Spot Cream
shortDescription: Targeted spot treatment for acne with calming centella complex.
fullDescription: A powerful spot treatment cream that helps reduce acne and blemishes quickly while soothing and healing the skin. formulated with centella asiatica leaf water and zinc oxide.
ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Butylene Glycol, Arachidyl Alcohol, Behenyl Alcohol, Centella Asiatica Leaf Water, Zinc Oxide, Dimethicone, Glyceryl Stearate SE, Arachidyl Glucoside, Cetyl Alcohol
usageInstructions: Apply a small amount directly onto troubled spots. Use at night for intensive treatment.

name: Relief Sun : Rice + Probiotics SPF50+ PA++++
shortDescription: Lightweight chemical sunscreen with rice water and probiotics for broad-spectrum protection.
fullDescription: A hydrating, lightweight sunscreen that offers SPF50+ PA++++ protection. Enriched with rice water and fermented grain extracts to nourish while protecting your skin from harmful UV rays.
ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Niacinamide, Butyloctyl Salicylate, Ethylhexyl Triazone, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Rice Ferment Filtrate, Sodium Hyaluronate
usageInstructions: Apply as the last step of your morning skincare routine. Reapply every 2-3 hours for extended sun exposure.

name: Ginseng Cleansing Oil
shortDescription: Gentle cleansing oil with ginseng seed oil for effective makeup removal.
fullDescription: A nourishing cleansing oil that removes makeup, sunscreen, and impurities while keeping skin hydrated. Ginseng seed oil helps improve circulation and skin elasticity.
ingredients: Ginseng Seed Oil, Sunflower Seed Oil, Olive Oil, Jojoba Oil, Sweet Almond Oil, Vitamin E, Soybean Oil, Sesame Oil
usageInstructions: Apply to dry face and massage gently. Add water to emulsify, then rinse thoroughly. Follow with water-based cleanser.

name: Ginseng Essence Water
shortDescription: Hydrating toner with 80% ginseng water for deep moisture and elasticity.
fullDescription: This essence water contains 80% ginseng root water, which helps to deeply hydrate while improving skin elasticity and providing anti-aging benefits. Leaves skin dewy and plump.
ingredients: Panax Ginseng Root Water, Glycerin, Butylene Glycol, Niacinamide, Panthenol, Hyaluronic Acid, Adenosine, Honey Extract, Royal Jelly Extract
usageInstructions: After cleansing, apply a generous amount to face and neck. Pat gently for absorption. Use morning and night.

name: Heartleaf 77% Soothing Toner
shortDescription: Calming toner with 77% heartleaf extract for sensitive and irritated skin.
fullDescription: A gentle, soothing toner formulated with 77% heartleaf (houttuynia cordata) extract, known for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Perfect for calming irritated and sensitive skin.
ingredients: Houttuynia Cordata Extract, Water, Butylene Glycol, Glycerin, 1,2-Hexanediol, Betaine, Allantoin, Panthenol, Sodium Hyaluronate
usageInstructions: After cleansing, apply with cotton pad or hands. Pat gently. Can be used for 7-skin method for intensive hydration.

name: Heartleaf Pore Control Cleansing Oil
shortDescription: Pore-refining cleansing oil with heartleaf for effective blackhead removal.
fullDescription: A lightweight cleansing oil that effectively removes makeup and impurities while controlling sebum and minimizing pores. Contains heartleaf extract to soothe and prevent breakouts.
ingredients: Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Sorbeth-30 Tetraoleate, Houttuynia Cordata Extract, Ethylhexyl Palmitate, Chamomilla Recutita Flower Extract, Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Oil
usageInstructions: Apply to dry skin and massage to dissolve makeup. Add water to emulsify. Rinse thoroughly and follow with water-based cleanser.

name: Madagascar Centella Ampoule
shortDescription: Pure centella asiatica ampoule for calming and healing irritated skin.
fullDescription: A supercharged ampoule containing 100% Madagascar centella asiatica extract, known for its powerful healing and soothing properties. Perfect for sensitive, irritated, or acne-prone skin.
ingredients: Centella Asiatica Extract, Water, Butylene Glycol, Glycerin, Pentylene Glycol, Panthenol, Madecassoside, Asiaticoside
usageInstructions: After toning, apply a few drops to face. Pat gently. Use morning and night for best results.

name: Madagascar Centella Light Cleansing Oil
shortDescription: Gentle cleansing oil with centella for sensitive skin types.
fullDescription: A mild cleansing oil infused with centella asiatica extract from Madagascar. Effectively removes makeup and impurities while soothing and healing the skin barrier.
ingredients: Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Centella Asiatica Extract, Cetyl Ethylhexanoate, Sorbeth-30 Tetraoleate, Butylene Glycol, Chamomilla Recutita Flower Extract
usageInstructions: Apply to dry face, massage to dissolve makeup. Add water to emulsify. Rinse thoroughly.

name: Dark Spot Correcting Glow Serum
shortDescription: Brightening serum with niacinamide for dark spots and hyperpigmentation.
fullDescription: A powerful brightening serum formulated with 5% niacinamide, squalane, and plant-derived squalane to target dark spots, hyperpigmentation, and uneven skin tone while maintaining hydration.
ingredients: Water, Niacinamide, Squalane, Butylene Glycol, Glycerin, Sodium Hyaluronate, Alpha-Arbutin, Glutathione, Panthenol
usageInstructions: Apply 2-3 drops to face after toning. Pat gently. Use morning and night. Always apply sunscreen during the day.

name: Complete No-Stress Sunscreen SPF50+ PA++++
shortDescription: Hydrating sunscreen with birch leaf sap for fresh, protected skin.
fullDescription: A lightweight, moisturizing sunscreen offering SPF50+ PA++++ protection. Contains birch leaf sap and nano-hyaluronic acid for deep hydration without white cast.
ingredients: Water, Butylene Glycol, Niacinamide, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Ethylhexyl Triazone, Betula Platyphylla Sap
usageInstructions: Apply as the final step of morning routine. Reapply every 2 hours for continued protection.

name: Birch Juice Moisturizing Sunscreen SPF50+ PA++++
shortDescription: Hydrating birch juice sunscreen with no white cast for all skin tones.
fullDescription: A refreshing, dewy sunscreen formulated with birch juice and hyaluronic acid for intense hydration. Provides SPF50+ PA++++ protection without leaving a white cast or greasy finish.
ingredients: Water, Betula Platyphylla Juice, Butylene Glycol, Niacinamide, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Sodium Hyaluronate
usageInstructions: Apply liberally as the last step of morning routine. Reapply throughout the day for continued protection.

name: 1025 Dokdo Toner
shortDescription: pH-balanced toner with deep sea water for hydration and exfoliation.
fullDescription: A gentle, pH-balancing toner enriched with deep sea water from Ulleungdo Island. Contains natural AHA and BHA for mild exfoliation while maintaining skin hydration.
ingredients: Water, Butylene Glycol, Betaine, Ulleungdo Deep Sea Water, Glycerin, Sodium Hyaluronate, Allantoin, Panthenol
usageInstructions: After cleansing, apply with cotton pad or hands. Pat gently. Can be layered for more hydration.

name: Super Miracle Spot 90 Cream
shortDescription: Intensive spot treatment with 90% snail mucin and AHA for acne scars.
fullDescription: A powerful spot treatment cream containing 90% snail mucin, AHA, BHA, and PHA for intensive care of acne spots and scars. Helps heal while preventing future breakouts.
ingredients: Snail Secretion Filtrate, Water, Glycerin, Butylene Glycol, Niacinamide, Salicylic Acid, Glycolic Acid, Betaine Salicylate, Panthenol
usageInstructions: Apply a small amount directly to spots or troubled areas. Use at night. Start with small amount and increase as tolerated.

name: Yuja Niacin Brightening Toner
shortDescription: Vitamin C toner with yuja extract for brightening and glowing skin.
fullDescription: A brightening toner containing yuja (citron) extract and 5% niacinamide to even out skin tone and fade dark spots. Provides antioxidant protection while hydrating the skin.
ingredients: Water, Yuja Extract, Niacinamide, Glycerin, Butylene Glycol, Ascorbic Acid, Salicylic Acid, Glutathione
usageInstructions: Apply after cleansing with cotton pad or hands. Pat gently. Use morning and night. Apply sunscreen during day.

name: DIVE-IN Serum
shortDescription: Lightweight hyaluronic acid serum for deep, long-lasting hydration.
fullDescription: A refreshing, lightweight serum containing 5 types of hyaluronic acid at different molecular weights for multi-level hydration. Perfect for all skin types, especially dehydrated skin.
ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Sodium Heparan Sulfate, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate, Butylene Glycol, Panthenol, Allantoin
usageInstructions: Apply a few drops to face after toning. Pat gently. Layer with moisturizer for best results. Use morning and night.

name: DIVE-IN Low Molecular Hyaluronic Acid Cream
shortDescription: Gel-type moisturizer with low molecular hyaluronic acid for deep hydration.
fullDescription: A lightweight gel cream containing low molecular hyaluronic acid that penetrates deeply into the skin. Provides intense hydration without sticky residue, leaving skin plump and dewy.
ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Sodium Heparan Sulfate, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate, Panthenol
usageInstructions: Apply as the final step of skincare routine. Gently massage into face and neck. Use morning and night.

name: SoonJung 10.0 Relief Toner
shortDescription: Pantethoside-enriched toner for sensitive, irritated skin relief.
fullDescription: A gentle, soothing toner formulated with panthenol and madecassoside to calm irritated and sensitive skin. Low pH formula maintains skin barrier health.
ingredients: Water, Butylene Glycol, Glycerin, Panthenol, Madecassoside, Pentylene Glycol, Allantoin, Sodium Hyaluronate
usageInstructions: After cleansing, apply with cotton pad or hands. Pat gently. Can be used for 7-skin method.

name: Time Revolution Night Repair Ampoule
shortDescription: Anti-aging night ampoule with fermented ingredients for skin renewal.
fullDescription: A powerful night treatment ampoule containing 50% fermented bifida ferment lysate to improve skin elasticity, texture, and radiance while you sleep. Targets signs of aging.
ingredients: Bifida Ferment Lysate, Water, Glycerin, Niacinamide, Adenosine, Panthenol, Hyaluronic Acid, Peptides
usageInstructions: After toning, apply a few drops to face. Follow with moisturizer. Use at night only.

name: Lip Sleeping Mask Berry
shortDescription: Berry-flavored overnight lip mask for soft, smooth lips.
fullDescription: An overnight lip treatment enriched with vitamin C and antioxidants from berry extract. Gently melts dead skin cells while providing deep hydration for soft, smooth lips by morning.
ingredients: Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, Diisostearyl Malate, Polybutene, Microcrystalline Wax, Berry Extract, Vitamin C, Hyaluronic Acid
usageInstructions: Apply generously to lips before bed. Leave on overnight. Gently wipe off in morning. Can also be used throughout the day.

name: Green Tea Seed Serum
shortDescription: Hydrating serum with Jeju green tea seeds for refreshed, dewy skin.
fullDescription: A lightweight serum containing green tea seeds from Jeju Island. Provides deep hydration and antioxidant protection while balancing oil and moisture for a fresh, dewy complexion.
ingredients: Water, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, Glycerin, Butylene Glycol, Niacinamide, Sodium Hyaluronate, Panthenol, Green Tea Seed Oil
usageInstructions: Apply after toning. Follow with moisturizer. Use morning and night for best results.

name: Juicy Lasting Tint - FigFig
shortDescription: Glossy, long-lasting lip tint with fig color and moisturizing finish.
fullDescription: A popular Korean lip tint that delivers a glossy, juicy finish with long-lasting color. The FigFig shade offers a beautiful deep fig tone that stains lips beautifully.
ingredients: Water, Propylene Glycol, Glycerin, Polyglyceryl-10 Decaoleate, Dipropylene Glycol, Fragrance, Fig Extract, Vitamin E
usageInstructions: Apply to lips starting from center. Layer for more intensity. Can be used alone or over lipstick.

name: Aloe Propolis Soothing Gel
shortDescription: Multi-purpose soothing gel with aloe vera and propolis for face and body.
fullDescription: A versatile soothing gel containing 80% aloe vera and propolis extract. Provides cooling relief for irritated, sunburned, or sensitive skin on face and body.
ingredients: Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Glycerin, Propolis Extract, Butylene Glycol, Panthenol, Allantoin, Dipotassium Glycyrrhizate
usageInstructions: Apply generously to face or body as needed. Refrigerate for extra cooling effect. Use after sun exposure.
